title: Scandal Makers
overview: Indonesian official remake from Korean movie with same title. Oscar, a has-been celebrity, is dying to get his name back up, when an opportunity finally appears albeit in form of a scandal: his love child from the past, Karin, suddenly shows up, with a baby of her own named Gempa.
